panels.title: Up
panels.description: Whether the Henyey process is up and reachable by Prometheus.

panels.title: Ledger Age
panels.description: Seconds since the last ledger close. On a healthy mainnet validator this should hover around 5-7s. Sustained values above 30s indicate the node has fallen behind or lost sync.

panels.title: Ledger Seq
panels.description: Current ledger number. Useful for cross-referencing with network explorers and other validators.

panels.title: Herder
panels.description: Internal herder state machine position. Indicates whether the node is tracking consensus, catching up, or in another state.

panels.title: Peers
panels.description: Total connected peers. Below 3 risks network partition; below 8 is degraded connectivity.

panels.title: Fail At
panels.description: Number of additional quorum nodes that can fail before this validator loses quorum. Zero means quorum loss is imminent. This is the single most critical safety metric.

panels.title: Missing
panels.description: Number of quorum peers not responding. Any non-zero value warrants investigation.

panels.title: Validator
panels.description: Whether this node is configured as a validator (participating in consensus, not just observing).

panels.title: Uptime
panels.description: Time since the Henyey process started. Useful for spotting unexpected restarts.

panels.title: FD Usage
panels.description: File descriptor usage as percentage of ulimit. Approaching the limit causes connection failures and crashes.

panels.title: Ledger Age
panels.description: Time series view of ledger age. Spikes indicate slow closes or temporary desync.

panels.title: Close Duration Percentiles
panels.description: Distribution of ledger close durations. The gap between p50 and p99 reveals tail latency.

panels.title: Close Duration Heatmap
panels.description: Visual density of close durations over time. Highlights clusters and outliers that percentile lines can miss.

panels.title: Apply Time
panels.description: Total ledger apply time for the most recent close. This is the CPU-bound portion of the close.

panels.title: Classic vs Soroban Execution
panels.description: Breakdown of ledger apply time between classic transaction execution and Soroban smart contract execution. Henyey-specific metric.

panels.title: Transaction & Operation Count
panels.description: Per-ledger transaction and operation counts. Correlate with apply time to understand throughput vs latency.

panels.title: TX Success vs Failure
panels.description: Per-ledger success/failure breakdown. A sustained increase in failures may indicate network issues, fee market shifts, or application bugs.

panels.title: Ledger Entries Modified
panels.description: Ledger entry churn per close. High creation rates indicate growth; deletion spikes may correlate with TTL expiry or state archival.

panels.title: Bucket Cache Hit Ratio
panels.description: Per-bucket RandomEvictionCache hit ratio (Account entries only). Low values are expected because the SnapshotHandle prefetch cache absorbs most lookups. Henyey-specific metric.

panels.title: Snapshot Cache Hit Ratio
panels.description: Fraction of SnapshotHandle lookups served from local caches (snapshot + prefetch/read-through) without dispatching to fallback. Primary cache effectiveness metric. Henyey-specific metric.

panels.title: Snapshot Cache Fallback Lookups
panels.description: Number of SnapshotHandle lookups per ledger that were not served by local caches and had to be dispatched to the fallback (bucket list / Soroban state). Henyey-specific metric.

panels.title: Total Fees
panels.description: Fees collected per ledger close. Proxy for network demand and fee market pressure.

panels.title: Quorum Agree / Disagree
panels.description: Number of quorum peers agreeing vs disagreeing with this validator.

panels.title: Quorum Fail At
panels.description: Quorum failure tolerance over time. Drops toward zero are the highest-severity operational event for a validator.

panels.title: Quorum Missing
panels.description: Missing quorum peers over time. Correlate with fail_at to understand safety margin.

panels.title: SCP Externalize Time
panels.description: Time taken to externalize (finalize) each consensus slot. Mainnet target is ~5s.

panels.title: SCP Nominate Time
panels.description: Time spent in the nomination phase of SCP.

panels.title: Externalize vs Nominate
panels.description: Both timings overlaid to visualize the nomination-to-externalization gap.

panels.title: SCP Envelope Rates
panels.description: Rate of SCP message emission and reception.

panels.title: Herder Lost Sync
panels.description: Rate of sync loss events. Should be zero under normal operation.

panels.title: Verify Latency (average)
panels.description: Average signature verification latency. Increases indicate CPU pressure on verify threads.

panels.title: Verify Backlogs
panels.description: Queue depths before and after verification.

panels.title: Post-Verify Throughput & Drops
panels.description: Throughput of the verify pipeline vs messages dropped post-verification.

panels.title: Prefilter Reject Rate
panels.description: Rate of SCP messages rejected before verification.

panels.title: Verifier Thread State
panels.description: Current state of the verifier thread pool.

panels.title: Herder Drift (percentiles)
panels.description: Clock/consensus drift across percentiles relative to peers. Henyey-specific metric.

panels.title: Pending Envelopes
panels.description: SCP envelopes waiting to be processed by the herder.

panels.title: TX Queue Composition
panels.description: Composition of the transaction queue.

panels.title: Pending TX Flow
panels.description: Transaction lifecycle flow rates.

panels.title: Duplicates & Too Old
panels.description: Rate of duplicate and expired transactions.

panels.title: Pending Transactions (global)
panels.description: Total pending (unconfirmed) transactions. Represents the current mempool pressure.

panels.title: Cached TX Sets
panels.description: Number of transaction sets cached by the herder for consensus rounds.

panels.title: Peer Breakdown
panels.description: Directional peer connection breakdown.

panels.title: Message Rates
panels.description: Overall message I/O rates.

panels.title: Error Rates
panels.description: Network error rates. Sustained errors indicate connection instability.

panels.title: Timeouts
panels.description: Peer timeout rates.

panels.title: Fetch Channel Depth
panels.description: Internal fetch channel queue depth. Henyey-specific metric.

panels.title: Jemalloc Resident Memory
panels.description: Resident set size as reported by jemalloc. Henyey-specific metric.

panels.title: Allocated vs Active
panels.description: Allocated = memory actively used. Active = memory in active pages. A large gap indicates internal fragmentation.

panels.title: Fragmentation
panels.description: Jemalloc fragmentation percentage.

panels.title: Mapped vs Retained
panels.description: Mapped = total virtual memory mapped by jemalloc. Retained = memory returned to the OS but still in the address space.

panels.title: File Descriptors
panels.description: Open file descriptors vs system limit.

panels.title: Merge Completed Rate
panels.description: Rate of bucket merge completions.

panels.title: Merge Time Rate
panels.description: CPU time spent on bucket merges per second.

panels.title: Merge Object Breakdown
panels.description: Breakdown of objects processed during merges by type.

panels.title: Soroban Config Table
panels.description: Current Soroban configuration values as seen by this validator.
